title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Verify that the Lens tenant correctly shows green marks for active headsets and red marks for disconnected headsets across Inventory, Inventory/device profile, and Device Users/user profile pages when a mobile user has 3+ paired headsets with some disconnected.
steps: 1. Pair 3 or more headsets to a single mobile user account.
2. Turn off or unpair at least one of the paired headsets so it becomes disconnected.
3. Navigate to the Inventory page and observe the status indicators for each headset.
4. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page and observe the status indicators for each headset.
5. Navigate to the Device Users/User Profile page and observe the status indicators for each headset.
expected: Active headsets show green marks, disconnected headsets show red marks consistently across the Inventory page, Inventory/Device Profile page, and Device Users/User Profile page.
